RURIMEGU-KAHO_DEFEND.title: Defend
RURIMEGU-KAHO_STRIKE.title: Strike
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.title: Special Thanks
RURIMEGU-SPECIAL_THANKS.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you play an Attack, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.title: Budding Premonition
RURIMEGU-BUDDING_PREMONITION.description: Increase max ♥ by {RURIMEGU-EXPAND_HEARTS:diff()}. Deal damage equal to your current max ♥. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
RURIMEGU-FINAL_APPEAL.title: Final Appeal
RURIMEGU-FINAL_APPEAL.description: Deal damage equal to your current ♥. Lose all ♥.
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.title: Training Outcomes
RURIMEGU-TRAINING_OUTCOMES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Backstage[/gold]: whenever you [gold]Collect[/gold], this card costs 1 less energy next time it is played.
RURIMEGU-KAHO_SMASH.title: Kaho Smash
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.title: 37.5°C's Fantasy
RURIMEGU-FANTASY375.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Your next Skill card costs {CostReduction:diff()} less energy this turn.
RURIMEGU-STEP_UP.title: Step Up!
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.title: Bunny Pyon Pyon
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_PYON_PYON.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Burst[/gold] equal to the damage dealt.
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.title: Cerise Bouquet
RURIMEGU-CERISE_BOUQUET.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 3 times.
